nasb.text: As for the live bird, he shall take it together with the cedar wood and the scarlet string and the hyssop, and shall dip them and the live bird in the blood of the bird that was slain over the running water.

esv.text: He shall take the live bird with the cedarwood and the scarlet yarn and the hyssop, and dip them and the live bird in the blood of the bird that was killed over the fresh water.

cnv.text: 至於那隻活鳥，祭司要把牠與香柏木、朱紅色線和牛膝草一起拿來，把這些物品和活鳥一同蘸於那在活水上宰殺的鳥血中，

ccb.text: 然后祭司要把另一只鸟，连同香柏木、朱红色线和牛膝草一起蘸在掺了清水的鸟血里。
